    Method
    Description
    GameSession
    GameService.newGame(List<PlayerSetup> playersInTurnOrder)
     
    GameSession
    WebGameSetupService.newGame(List<PlayerSetup> playersInTurnOrder)
    Creates a new game with bank tokens, shuffled development cards, and the correct noble count.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    GameService.buyCardFromTable(GameSession session, int level, int index)
     
    boolean
    WebCardRulesService.buyCardFromTable(GameSession session, int level, int index)
    Purchases an open card if the current player can pay with gems (and gold as wildcard).
    boolean
    GameService.buyReservedCard(GameSession session, int reservedIndex)
     
    boolean
    WebCardRulesService.buyReservedCard(GameSession session, int reservedIndex)
    Purchases a reserved card by index in the current player's hand.
    void
    TurnPhaseService.checkGameEnd(GameSession session)
    Sets GameSession.setFinalRound(boolean) when any player reaches GameSession.getPointsToWin().
    List<Integer>
    GameOutcomeService.computeWinnerPlayerIds(GameSession gs)
    Finds all player IDs tied for the win: highest prestige, then fewest bought cards among those tied on points.
    List<Integer>
    GameService.computeWinnerPlayerIds(GameSession gs)
     
    List<String>
    CpuTurnService.executeOneCPUTurn(GameSession gs)
    Executes one action for gs.getCurrentPlayer() (must be CPU).
    List<String>
    GameService.executeOneCPUTurn(GameSession gs)
    Runs exactly one CPU turn (mutates gs) and returns log lines for the UI.
    void
    GameService.executeReturnTokens(GameSession session, List<String> tokensToReturn)
     
    void
    WebTokenRulesService.executeReturnTokens(GameSession session, List<String> tokensToReturn)
    Returns gems from the current player to the bank until at or under the token limit, processing tokensToReturn in order (one removal per listed colour per iteration).
    Noble
    GameService.finishTurn(GameSession session)
     
    Noble
    TurnPhaseService.finishTurn(GameSession session)
    Processes noble acquisition for the player who just acted, updates GameSession end-state flags, and advances GameSession.advanceToNextPlayer().
    Noble
    NobleAcquisitionService.processNobleAcquisition(GameSession session, Player player)
    If the player qualifies for one or more available nobles, takes the first qualifying noble (deterministic order).
    boolean
    GameService.reserveCardFromDeck(GameSession session, int level)
     
    boolean
    WebCardRulesService.reserveCardFromDeck(GameSession session, int level)
    Takes the top card of the closed deck for the level into reserves; grants gold if available.
    boolean
    GameService.reserveCardFromTable(GameSession session, int level, int index)
     
    boolean
    WebCardRulesService.reserveCardFromTable(GameSession session, int level, int index)
    Moves a face-up card into the current player's reserves and refills the slot; grants one gold if any remain.
    boolean
    GameService.take2Tokens(GameSession session, String color)
     
    boolean
    WebTokenRulesService.take2Tokens(GameSession session, String color)
    Takes two tokens of the same colour when the bank holds at least four of that colour.
    boolean
    GameService.take3Tokens(GameSession session, List<String> colors)
     
    boolean
    WebTokenRulesService.take3Tokens(GameSession session, List<String> colors)
    Takes one token of each of three distinct colours from the bank for the current player.
